user.title: Prama Camera Connection
user.description: Enter the camera's IP address and pramaAPI credentials. The connection will be tested before proceeding.

onvif.title: ONVIF Configuration (Optional)
onvif.description: Optionally provide ONVIF credentials to auto-register this camera for RTSP video streaming in Home Assistant.

sensors.title: Sensor Settings
sensors.description: Configure the motion detection sensor. Camera: {model} (firmware {firmware}).

data_description.sensor_name: Used in entity ID (e.g., prama_front). Lowercase with underscores only.
data_description.off_delay: Seconds after last detection before sensor turns off (10-600)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to camera. Check host and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username and password.
error.onvif_failed: ONVIF connection failed. You can continue without it.
